query:
-- Move the VOCUS-MOB portal duplicates from C0295 to C2862 (they are Sutherland's SIMs)
UPDATE services 
SET customerExternalId = 'C2862'
WHERE externalId IN ('VOCUS-MOB-13599000', 'VOCUS-MOB-13619752');

-- Mark them as unbillable (duplicates of S6952 and S6953)
INSERT IGNORE INTO unbillable_services (serviceExternalId, customerExternalId, reason, markedBy)
VALUES 
  ('VOCUS-MOB-13599000', 'C2862', 'Vocus portal sync duplicate of S6952 (0478489339)', 'system'),
  ('VOCUS-MOB-13619752', 'C2862', 'Vocus portal sync duplicate of S6953 (0478489375)', 'system'),
  ('VOCUS-MOB-13679722', 'C2862', 'Vocus portal sync duplicate of S7024 (0478489694)', 'system');

-- Assign S7024 (the canonical Sutherland SIM) to BI00008
INSERT IGNORE INTO service_billing_assignments 
  (billingItemExternalId, serviceExternalId, customerExternalId, assignedBy, assignmentMethod, assignmentBucket)
VALUES ('BI00008', 'S7024', 'C2862', 'system', 'auto', 'standard');

-- Assign S0446 (ABB NBN) to BI00008 for Sutherland
INSERT IGNORE INTO service_billing_assignments 
  (billingItemExternalId, serviceExternalId, customerExternalId, assignedBy, assignmentMethod, assignmentBucket)
VALUES ('BI00008', 'S0446', 'C2862', 'system', 'auto', 'standard');

-- Mark S1541 (SmileTel VoIP on C2862) as unbillable - it's a Xero billing line item
INSERT IGNORE INTO unbillable_services (serviceExternalId, customerExternalId, reason, markedBy)
VALUES ('S1541', 'C2862', 'Xero billing line item (revenue), not a supplier cost', 'system');

-- Assign S7009 (Vocus SIM) to BI00086 for Elizabeth St
INSERT IGNORE INTO service_billing_assignments 
  (billingItemExternalId, serviceExternalId, customerExternalId, assignedBy, assignmentMethod, assignmentBucket)
VALUES ('BI00086', 'S7009', 'C0335', 'system', 'auto', 'standard');

-- Mark VOCUS-MOB-13596454 as unbillable (duplicate of S7009 for Elizabeth St)
INSERT IGNORE INTO unbillable_services (serviceExternalId, customerExternalId, reason, markedBy)
VALUES ('VOCUS-MOB-13596454', 'C0335', 'Vocus portal sync duplicate of S7009', 'system');
